mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project ( name, description, owner_name, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{ownerName}, #{status}, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, owner_name, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM project WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project WHERE deleted = false
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE project SET deleted = true, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
